property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\maven\bin;c:\Users\Juanita\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Complete happy path - Create, Book, and Receive Confirmation", "Optional[Cancel Booking]"](1)
testcase.system-out:
@cancelBooking @smoke @api @regression @positive @CB_1 Scenario Outline: Complete happy path - Create, Book, and Receive Confirmation # src/test/resources/features/cancelBooking.feature:46 Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "password", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 01:12:11 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: LN6k6yaWQHCAMJKIacI7Nw x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsap440089-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsap440089-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=hQu%2B1JSdGLrwmFhn2vI6zTuZHfkp3fR3P%2FSdLNIny2ajJCRtdQk0aZ6dWA58KGrcc3Y6AWepFu9nL8feWRu2y9Up9xo2wJ6zwADvv4iFxGQlljkxah3KL%2B%2FnvEHhcNA7ZUkdSnScCBuTq39KDA%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e433e9aab8445c8-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "token": "SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV" } When User authenticates as user credentials: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_authenticates_as_admin_credentials(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) And User stores the authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_stores_the_authentication_token() Then API response status code for E2E should be 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_for_E_E_should_be(int) When User enters search criteria with checkin "2025-12-19" and checkout "2025-12-21" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_enters_search_criteria_with_checkin_and_checkout(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Authentication Token: Cookie , token=SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV requestBody: {firstname=Josh, bookingdates={checkin=2025-12-19, checkout=2025-12-21}, phone=07358480685, depositpaid=false, roomid=2236, email=josh@example.com, lastname=Mike} Endpoint: reservation/2236?checkin=2025-12-19&checkout=2025-12-21 Spec: io.restassured.internal.RequestSpecificationImpl@22ec55c4 Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Cookie=token=SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Authorization=automationintesting.online Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstname": "Josh", "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-19", "checkout": "2025-12-21" }, "phone": "07358480685", "depositpaid": false, "roomid": 2236, "email": "josh@example.com", "lastname": "Mike" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 01:12:12 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: 03ZEtmhhR-all8ETJH0Vcg x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880067-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880067-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=ojIzRL5Rb5ymtoSSmhatW%2BTqwehuhhcMfdXRWEhFZQSNpOeS%2FWPn6%2Fni9X%2FjG3WaU7Dc37owjgQph9TmbGd0taVI8d5erVnZvIDFmejKRS4txm7NAmNSG2zMIUhDOnCuqTZvvStvrNMZDIJFQw%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e433ea4fcb9fd7d-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "bookingid": 4, "roomid": 2236, "firstname": "Josh", "lastname": "Mike", "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-19", "checkout": "2025-12-21" } } And User creates a new booking with following details and submits the booking: # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_creates_a_new_booking_with_following_details_and_submits_the_booking(io.cucumber.datatable.DataTable) Then API response status code should be 201 for booking creation # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_status_code_should_be_for_booking_creation(int) And User should see booking confirmation page with booking ID displayed # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_should_see_booking_confirmation_page_with_booking_ID_displayed() Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/4 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Cookie=token=SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 01:12:13 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: TYRiQ9sAQ0SJrDvQVOLIQQ x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880081-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880081-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=2zmUj3cghV93PK6xkYbP%2BOshbSPYm%2F%2BtLIcdMXw8kraZjkVRNcMTd9chvX9z7rd%2FrUd%2F3yXNx6Jhl40Paq0GzWW6lZGIjCg8DSQymVqTd8i8ePiOMCXOyxtnW%2FQ%2FcDal2DF1IJzF4YGOV%2F2B%2BQ%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e433eaa6a325d17-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "bookingid": 4, "roomid": 2236, "firstname": "Josh", "lastname": "Mike", "depositpaid": false, "bookingdates": { "checkin": "2025-12-19", "checkout": "2025-12-21" } } When User retrieves booking details using stored booking ID via API # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_retrieves_booking_details_using_stored_booking_ID_via_API() Then API response should contain booking details with status code 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_should_contain_booking_details_with_status_code(int) Request method: DELETE Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/4 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Cookie=token=SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 01:12:14 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: -ENdZNcGRJeWjbWaVOLIQQ x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880067-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880067-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=7VKgwQ%2BkYUZJubngkqUr2uctJsHbb4zGai%2FDv%2BZC0MqP5jtfIRyBJjhn5fjG0HQDkB3RULjFM3FE4p6JYfIe8RdzNw0HEwZH8PvSuiPMgvYImw1dIubhSuhqBEfBB0qDcNHaz6luYI%2Bk1Oybgw%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e433eaf5f99fdac-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "success": true } When User attempts to cancel booking with ID via API # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.User_attempts_to_cancel_booking_with_ID_via_API() Then Booking cancellation should be successful with status 200 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.Booking_cancellation_should_be_successful_with_status(int) Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/booking/4 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Authorization=Bearer SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Cookie=token=SBkTW51CbTYZ9HzV Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 404 Not Found Date: Mon, 30 Mar 2026 01:12:14 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: 0D8_SjDhQQWJjiXIAQeqjw x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880081-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880081-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=JUpgcPpBcXmTBULvgHsghblA8Su2U%2BB5nE4dUn9DhtjPdmadGz%2FDkspahrUczvw9j%2BDYgQLwRyT%2FM3rKipZKpo6jIhw9E1WyNmAulxVBuAtTDpy3wURomy9LXFwAK2T0A9Fv2SD5SXNy7HW%2FSA%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e433eb1bea9fe13-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Failed to fetch booking: 404" } And API response should return 404 when retrieving cancelled booking details # com.booking.stepDefinitions.E2EHotelBooking.API_response_should_return_when_retrieving_cancelled_booking_details(int)

testcase.name: runScenario["Attempt to cancel a non-existent booking", "Optional[Cancel Booking]"](2)
